name: Easy Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, cocoa powder, sugar, and salt) into a bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together water, vanilla extract, vegetable oil, and white vinegar.
3. Add the liquid mixture to the dry ingredients and stir until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes.
6. Turn off the oven when the cake is done, and let it cool in the pan for a few minutes before removing it to a wire rack to cool completely.
